body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
This weekend's diagnostic EDMF benchmark runs [failed](https://buildkite.com/clima/climacoupler-cpu-gpu-benchmarks/builds/195#_) because we tried to close the `amip_diags_handler` when it was never created. This PR fixes the check to see if it needs to be closed so we only close if it exists.
title: fix amip_diags_handler close
Set radiation seed in the non-random amip

## Content
- [x] add a file `experiments/ClimaEarth/test/runtests.jl` that can be used by upstream packages for downstream testing
- [x] add a small AMIP test and call it from `runtests.jl`
- [x] add a config file that is coarse and short for this test
title: add amip test to exp/ClimaEarth/
